title: Payroll based on the native time tracking column
excerpt: My team is trying to figure out how we can run payroll based off data in the native monday time tracking column. Exporting the data isn’t very helpful because the format is weird. Any teams out there currently have a sys…

posts.author: liambailey (Liam Bailey)
posts.cookedHtml: My team is trying to figure out how we can run payroll based off data in the native monday time tracking column. Exporting the data isn’t very helpful because the format is weird. Any teams out there currently have a system for this? It doesn’t have to be great, just needs to work. What workarounds are you using? Are you using other software instead of the time tracking column?
